title: Up to 90% discounts: Dubai shoppers rush to Ramadan Super Sale at Festival City Mall before Eid 2026
summary_full: Dubai Festival City Mall is hosting a Ramadan Super Sale with discounts up to 90% until March 15. This event, part of Dubai's wider retail strategy, aims to boost spending ahead of Eid Al Fitr. Shoppers are flocking to the mall for fashion, lifestyle and entertainment deals, transforming it into a busy retail hotspot.
